_comment: AGSIST farm-bill page data. Edit this, then run build_farmbill.py (or push — the GitHub Action bakes it). Values are baked into static HTML so AI crawlers see them. HTML entities allowed in text fields. Keep <b> for emphasis.

tldr.v: The House passed H.R. 7567 (224–200). The Senate released its draft, the Agricultural Act of 2026, on Jun 23. Neither is law.
Programs carry a $1.374T ten-year baseline. Each bill's own change scores about budget-neutral.
Nutrition (SNAP) is 71.7% of the baseline. Four titles are ~99% of it.
The current extension expires Sep 30, 2026 — the practical cutoff to finish or extend again.
Senate committee markup is expected in July, then a conference to reconcile the two bills.
The $15–17B in near-term economic aid producers are pushing for sits outside both farm bills.

compare.h: Passed the House 224–200 on Apr 30; ~800 pages; CBO-scored.
compare.s: Discussion draft released Jun 23; 902 pages; markup expected July; not yet scored.

compare.h: Budget-neutral by CBO (+$162M over 6 yr, $0 over 11 yr).
compare.s: Described as budget-neutral; awaiting a detailed CBO score.

compare.h: Cuts EQIP −$786M and redistributes to other conservation programs.
compare.s: Raises easement cost-share (50→60%); new Forest Conservation Easement and State Conservation Assistance programs.

compare.h: Raises maximum direct and guaranteed loan amounts.
compare.s: Marquee item: guaranteed operating to $3M, ownership to $3.5M, indexed to inflation.

compare.h: Moves Food for Peace administration toward USDA; extends Bill Emerson Trust.
compare.s: More than doubles MAP and FMD funding; defends common food names abroad.

compare.h: Extends SNAP through 2031; states may outsource certification.
compare.s: Extends SNAP; staffing flexibility, permanent online purchasing, Buy American school meals.

compare.h: Pesticide-labeling and E15 fights nearly derailed floor passage.
compare.s: Deliberately sidesteps hemp, year-round E15, and animal-confinement laws.
Not included — a separate $15–17B aid push is moving outside the bill.

tracker.desc: House Ag reported it favorably, 34–17 · Mar 5, 2026
tracker.label: passed

tracker.desc: House bill scored budget-neutral over 11 years · Apr 24, 2026
tracker.label: done

tracker.desc: Boozman released the Agricultural Act of 2026 discussion draft · Jun 23, 2026
tracker.label: released

tracker.desc: Committee markup expected in July; floor passage needs 60 votes
tracker.label: next up

tracker.desc: Reconcile the House and Senate versions into one bill
tracker.label: ahead

tracker.desc: CBO assumes a signing around the start of August 2026
tracker.label: ahead

tracker.desc: Current extension lapses without action · Sep 30, 2026
tracker.label: hard date
